item.name: About

description.content: Retrieve API metadata, version, and schema information

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get QRS API information

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get QRS API information

description.content: Retrieves basic information about the QRS API including the build version and the database identifier.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

response.name: QRS API information returned successfully

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Authentication failed. The request lacks valid authentication credentials or the Xrfkey header/parameter is missing or mismatched.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: App

description.content: Manage Qlik Sense applications including import, export, copy, publish, and reload

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List applications

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List applications

description.content: Retrieves a list of Qlik Sense applications in condensed format, optionally filtered by a query expression.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.
Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'
Property name to order results by, optionally followed by asc or desc.
Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

response.name: List of applications returned successfully

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Authentication failed. The request lacks valid authentication credentials or the Xrfkey header/parameter is missing or mismatched.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Stream

description.content: Manage streams for organizing and distributing apps

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List streams

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List streams

description.content: Retrieves a list of all streams in condensed format, optionally filtered by a query expression.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.
Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'
Property name to order results by, optionally followed by asc or desc.
Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

response.name: List of streams returned successfully

Qlik Sense server hostname

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Repository Service API

description.content:
Core REST API for managing Qlik Sense Enterprise resources including apps, streams, users, security rules, and all configuration available through the Qlik Management Console (QMC). The QRS API provides CRUD operations for all entity types in the Qlik Sense repository, enabling programmatic administration of a Qlik Sense Enterprise deployment.

Contact Support:
 Name: Qlik Support
